objective: Close F-0162 statically by capturing one strict versioned private paper-question snapshot from the exact server-owned source facts used by AI paper selection in the same result materialization boundary, then creating the first learning session only from that immutable result snapshot without re-reading mutable current question or organization-training sources.
blockedFiles: any migration apply, real database/data, Provider/network call, permission, entitlement, quota, Prompt, dependency, deployment, secret/env, PR, force-push or mechanism change

preRedImpactScan.authoritativeChain: authorized AI paper generation -> exact server-owned platform and organization-training source rows used by selection -> private versioned paper-question snapshot -> result insert and task completion transaction -> authorized first learning-session creation from that snapshot only
preRedImpactScan.currentVulnerableSink: the persisted paper result contains only redacted selected-question references, while the first learning session re-reads mutable current question and organization-training sources after result completion
preRedImpactScan.securityInvariant: a persisted result must identify one immutable complete question fact set; authorization precedes any private snapshot read; no answer, analysis, scoring or internal source identity appears in public result/history DTOs
preRedImpactScan.legitimateBehavior: existing sessions resume their immutable session snapshot; a new session uses the result-time private snapshot; a legacy paper result without a snapshot fails closed rather than re-reading current sources
preRedImpactScan.bundleDisposition: F-0162 is selected independently; F-0163 remains the answer-write CAS residual and F-0164 remains the lifecycle/history/statistics residual after its prerequisites

requiredSemantics.schema: additive legacy-nullable paper-question snapshot schema version, JSON snapshot and lowercase SHA-256 digest with strict all-null or all-current coherence and task-type isolation; no default, backfill, data SQL or destructive DDL
requiredSemantics.factSource: the private snapshot is built from the exact full server-owned source rows returned by the same source-resolution operation used for selection; no post-selection current-source re-read, client body, preview or masked DTO is authoritative
requiredSemantics.exactSet: candidate source keys are case-sensitive unique and fact-consistent, while the candidate set may be larger than the selected set; every selected sourceKind plus questionPublicId matches exactly one full fact and snapshot count, key set and order match only the assembled selected questions; unselected candidates never enter the snapshot and missing, duplicate, case conflict, wrong group/material/source or malformed selected facts fail the whole result
requiredSemantics.integrity: schemaVersion, result/task/owner identity, paper container digest, ordered full questions, group/material facts and canonical digest are runtime validated and deeply detached; unknown, partial, sparse, conflicting or oversized current snapshots fail closed
requiredSemantics.atomicity: current paper result insert, private snapshot and task succeeded transition share the existing transaction and replay binding; any snapshot or persistence failure leaves no result, task success or partial snapshot
requiredSemantics.replay: same task/result/content/container/snapshot digest returns the immutable persisted result without source re-read or rewrite; any differing snapshot or digest is a stable conflict with zero mutation
requiredSemantics.learningSession: authorization and owner scope are verified before private snapshot lookup; first session creation consumes only the exact current private snapshot; existing session resume remains read-only; legacy all-null paper results cannot create a new session from mutable current sources
requiredSemantics.privacy: public result, history, error and learning-session creation responses do not expose standard answers, analysis, scoring points, citations, raw source rows, database ids or internal source identity; learner question answers remain protected by the existing session contract
requiredSemantics.unchanged: F-0157 seven-type contract, F-0150 citation redaction, F-0148 quota fail-closed gate, Provider behavior, authorization scope, question/training writes and existing session answer semantics remain unchanged

minimumAdversarialTests: platform-only and mixed platform/enterprise paper results persist an exact ordered detached private snapshot and create the first session after later source rename/edit/disable without drift

candidate supersets are accepted but only selected facts are snapshotted; selected-source missing, duplicate, case conflict, wrong sourceKind, wrong group/material membership or metadata mismatch causes zero result, task-success and session writes
snapshot unknown/partial/sparse/oversized fields, identity mismatch, digest mismatch and public/private container mismatch fail closed
same immutable replay returns the existing result with zero source re-read and zero rewrite; different snapshot or digest conflicts
legacy all-null result with no existing session is stable unavailable and performs zero current question/training lookup; an existing immutable session still resumes
authorization, owner and organization masking precede private snapshot lookup; cross-owner and cross-organization callers observe existing not-found behavior
public result/history JSON contains no private snapshot fields, standard answer, analysis, scoring points or internal ids
migration contains only three nullable columns and exact coherence/task-type checks with no UPDATE, DELETE, DROP, TRUNCATE, backfill or apply
F-0157 seven question types, group/material snapshot integrity, generated-question private snapshot, F-0163 answer behavior and existing history/detail regressions remain GREEN

validationCommands.name: state-schema-source-contract
arguments: keeps task state and additive migration source exact

conditions: fresh task-bound database approval is received before RED or product writes
one offline additive migration source is generated and never applied
all validation commands and one main-thread adversarial review are GREEN
final diff stays inside the approved 43-file envelope
a fresh database token binds the final candidate tree before Kernel/full
base, origin, risk and semantics remain unchanged

nextReviewHints: freeze the verified candidate and request one fresh database token bound to the exact final tree before Kernel/full
keep F-0163 and F-0164 pending as independent tasks

corrections: accept the authoritative 1000-candidate collection while snapshotting only the bounded selected subset
bind ai_paper_generation replay to the persisted content digest without changing ai_question_generation replay semantics
reject every duplicate platform source public id including byte-identical rows
